rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Elec. Code §86.003, which governs mail ballot addressing methods. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The balloting materials for voting by mail shall be provided to the voter by mail.
_note: No conflict; Elec. Code §86.003 addresses mail-in ballot delivery and addressing, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
